---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Park & Polish: Developing a Mobile Car Care Venture Through Market Analysis and Marketing Strategy

Park & Polish was developed as part of a New Enterprise Development project focused on identifying a real customer pain point and transforming it into a scalable business concept. The idea centred on a mobile car care service delivered while customers’ vehicles were already parked in locations such as shopping centres, airports, and business parks.

This project explored convenience, sustainability, digital booking, partner-based growth, and customer-focused service design. It helped me strengthen my understanding of value proposition development, customer insight, and strategic marketing thinking.

## Business Analysis and Process Improvement Project for a Cookie Manufacturing Company

This project involved a comprehensive business analysis of a cookie manufacturing company, with the objective of improving both production and sales processes. The work focused on identifying operational inefficiencies, calculating production costs, analysing profit margins, and evaluating opportunities to reduce costs across the supply chain.

By applying business analysis tools such as cost-benefit analysis and process mapping, the project developed practical recommendations to improve efficiency, reduce waste, and strengthen profitability.
